all.en: I had walked past the public library hundreds of times without going in.
all.zh: 我從公共圖書館前走過上百次，卻從未踏進去。

all.en: On a quiet Wednesday afternoon, I finally decided to apply for a card.
all.zh: 在一個安靜的週三下午，我終於決定去申請借書證。

all.en: The librarian at the counter was patient and explained the rules clearly.
all.zh: 櫃台的圖書館員很有耐心，清楚地向我說明規則。

all.en: I needed two forms of identification and proof of my current address.
all.zh: 我需要兩種證件以及目前住址的證明。

all.en: Within fifteen minutes, a shiny new card was placed in my hand.
all.zh: 不到十五分鐘，一張嶄新的借書證就被遞到我手上。

all.en: She gave me a quick tour of the fiction and biography sections upstairs.
all.zh: 她迅速帶我參觀樓上的小說區和傳記區。

all.en: I was amazed to learn I could borrow ten books at once for free.
all.zh: 得知我可以一次免費借十本書，我感到很驚訝。

all.en: They also offered e-books and audiobooks through a simple mobile app.
all.zh: 他們也透過簡便的手機應用程式提供電子書與有聲書。

all.en: I picked out a novel, a cookbook, and a history of local architecture.
all.zh: 我挑了一本小說、一本食譜書，以及一本當地建築史。

all.en: On my way out, I noticed a flyer for a weekly book discussion group.
all.zh: 離開時，我注意到一張每週讀書討論會的傳單。

all.en: I promised myself I would come back next Saturday to give it a try.
all.zh: 我答應自己下週六一定要回來試試看。

all.en: That Saturday, I arrived at the library ten minutes before the meeting started.
all.zh: 那個週六，我提早十分鐘抵達圖書館參加讀書會。

all.en: About a dozen people sat in a circle of comfortable chairs near the window.
all.zh: 大約十幾個人圍成一圈，坐在窗邊舒適的椅子上。

all.en: The leader welcomed me warmly and handed me a printed list of upcoming books.
all.zh: 主持人熱情地歡迎我，並遞給我一份印好的未來書單。

all.en: This week, they were discussing a popular novel about a small island community.
all.zh: 本週他們正在討論一本熱門小說，內容描述一座小島上的社區。

all.en: I had not read it yet, so I mostly listened and took quiet notes.
all.zh: 我還沒讀過那本書，所以大多時間都在傾聽並安靜地做筆記。

all.en: People shared very different opinions, but everyone respected each other's perspectives.
all.zh: 大家分享了非常不同的看法，但每個人都尊重彼此的觀點。

all.en: During the break, a retired teacher recommended several authors I had never heard of.
all.zh: 中場休息時，一位退休老師推薦了幾位我從未聽過的作家。

all.en: I borrowed two of his recommendations before leaving the library that afternoon.
all.zh: 那天下午離開圖書館前，我借了他推薦的其中兩本書。

all.en: Within a few weeks, the librarians knew my name and my favorite genres.
all.zh: 才過了幾週，圖書館員就記住了我的名字和我喜愛的書籍類型。

all.en: The library quietly became my favorite place to escape the noise of the city.
all.zh: 圖書館不知不覺成為我躲避城市喧囂、最喜愛的去處。

all.en: On rainy weekends, I started spending entire afternoons curled up in the reading corner.
all.zh: 下雨的週末，我開始把整個下午都窩在閱讀角落裡。

all.en: The library hosted a free workshop on writing personal memoirs that I attended eagerly.
all.zh: 圖書館舉辦了一場免費的個人回憶錄寫作工作坊，我熱切地報名參加。

all.en: The instructor encouraged us to start with a single vivid memory from childhood.
all.zh: 講師鼓勵我們從一個鮮明的童年記憶開始寫起。

all.en: I wrote about the summer I learned to ride a bicycle in my grandfather's village.
all.zh: 我寫下在爺爺村子裡學會騎腳踏車的那個夏天。

all.en: During feedback, several classmates said my piece made them feel deeply nostalgic.
all.zh: 回饋時間，好幾位同學說我的作品讓他們深深懷舊。

all.en: The librarian suggested I submit it to the library's annual community writing contest.
all.zh: 圖書館員建議我把它投稿到圖書館每年舉辦的社區寫作比賽。

all.en: To my surprise, my short essay received an honorable mention out of many entries.
all.zh: 令我驚訝的是，我那篇短文在眾多投稿中獲得了佳作獎。

all.en: They printed it in a small booklet and displayed it near the children's reading section.
all.zh: 他們將它印在一本小冊子裡，並陳列在兒童閱覽區附近。

all.en: My elderly mother teared up when I handed her a copy during her birthday dinner.
all.zh: 我在媽媽的生日晚餐上把一份送給她，她感動到流下了淚。

all.en: What had started as a simple library card had bloomed into an unexpected creative life.
all.zh: 當初一張單純的借書證，竟綻放成意想不到的創作生活。

all.en: Encouraged by my honorable mention, I started a small writing group at the library myself.
all.zh: 佳作獎讓我備受鼓舞，我在圖書館自行開辦了一個小型寫作小組。

all.en: Six members joined our first session, all eager to share their childhood memories on paper.
all.zh: 我們的第一場聚會就有六位成員加入，大家都迫不及待想將童年記憶寫下。

all.en: We met every other Sunday afternoon in the quiet seminar room near the reference section.
all.zh: 我們每隔週日下午在參考書區附近的安靜研討室聚會。

all.en: One member wrote about escaping war as a child, which moved the entire group to tears.
all.zh: 有位成員寫下兒時逃離戰火的經歷，讓全組人都感動落淚。

all.en: Another shared sweet stories about her grandmother's tiny tailor shop in 1970s Tainan.
all.zh: 另一位分享她奶奶在 1970 年代台南小裁縫店的甜蜜故事。

all.en: The library offered to publish our combined memoirs in a printed community anthology next year.
all.zh: 圖書館提議明年將我們合輯的回憶錄出版為印刷版社區文集。

all.en: We celebrated by ordering pizza and sharing our favorite passages aloud one final time.
all.zh: 我們以訂披薩慶祝，並最後一次大聲朗讀彼此最喜愛的段落。

all.en: The librarian asked if I would lead a beginner writing workshop for teenagers this summer.
all.zh: 圖書館員問我今年夏天是否願意帶領一場青少年寫作入門工作坊。

all.en: I accepted immediately, remembering how nervous I had felt at my own first workshop.
all.zh: 我立刻答應，想起自己第一次參加工作坊時是多麼緊張。

all.en: Looking at the new card in my wallet, I smiled at how much one small step changed.
all.zh: 看著錢包裡的新借書證，我微笑回想一個小小的步伐竟改變了這麼多。

all.en: The teenage workshop attracted twelve nervous but curious students from three nearby high schools.
all.zh: 青少年工作坊吸引了十二位來自附近三所高中、緊張卻好奇的學生。

all.en: I started by sharing my own first awkward piece, which made everyone laugh and relax.
all.zh: 我先分享自己第一次寫得很笨拙的作品，讓大家放聲大笑、放鬆下來。

all.en: Each student wrote about a childhood memory, just as I had once been encouraged to do.
all.zh: 每位學生都寫下一段童年記憶，就像當年有人鼓勵我所做的那樣。

all.en: One quiet boy wrote about his late grandfather teaching him to fold paper cranes.
all.zh: 一位安靜的男孩寫下已故爺爺教他摺紙鶴的回憶。

all.en: Another shared the day she finally rode a bicycle without her training wheels on.
all.zh: 另一位分享了她終於拿掉輔助輪、獨立騎腳踏車的那一天。

all.en: We compiled their pieces into a small printed booklet for the library's teen reading shelf.
all.zh: 我們將他們的作品集結成一本小冊子，放在圖書館青少年閱讀架上。

all.en: Several parents thanked me personally, saying their teens had never written so deeply before.
all.zh: 好幾位家長親自向我道謝，說孩子從未寫得如此深入過。

all.en: The library director offered me a part-time position coordinating creative programs for young readers.
all.zh: 圖書館館長提供我一份兼職工作，負責協調針對青少年讀者的創意活動。

all.en: I accepted gratefully, leaving my old office job after careful consideration with my family.
all.zh: 我心懷感激地答應了，並在與家人深思熟慮後辭去原本的辦公室工作。

all.en: What had begun as one quiet library card had become my entire meaningful new career.
all.zh: 當初一張寧靜的借書證，竟成了我整個全新而有意義的職業生涯。
